name: refactor-project
title: brainstorm: project refactor
scope: destructive parity migration and current-core deletion
creator: lijin
notes: Baseline committed as aba33f3. Native v1 memory-atoms committed as 52c215b; owner-config endpoints committed as dfd596b; package/import/visitor/gameplay utility endpoints committed as 968ee65; checkpoint docs committed as 4c70ba5. Current runtime migration slice adds native v1 LLM probe, group-chat config/send/history/talkativeness, voice config, TTS/STT endpoints; adds domain/group_chat_policy.py, contracts/application/routes, frontend typed clients including readApiBlob, backend/tests/test_v1_runtime_features.py, and backend spec/task notes. This slice keeps using reusable product-core domain modules but does not delegate to core/web/service.py or core/web/router.py. Validation passed for current slice: focused runtime test 2 passed, backend/tests 27 passed, full pytest 256 passed, frontend typecheck/build/test passed, git diff --check passed with PRD LF→CRLF warning only. Native v1 character-assets slice adds expression catalog/inference, character sprite map read/write, standalone SillyTavern character-card parse/export, domain/expression_policy.py, frontend typed clients, backend/tests/test_v1_character_assets.py, and backend spec/task notes. Validation passed: py_compile for changed Python files; isolated clean-worktree compileall, focused character-assets test (2 passed), backend/tests (29 passed), full pytest (258 passed, with existing frontend/dist copied for the legacy static-shell test); frontend typecheck/build/test; git diff --cached --check. Unrelated MySQL WIP and deleted reference PNGs remain unstaged. Native v1 global WorldInfo slice adds /api/v1/worldinfo CRUD/test routes, WorldInfoWriteRequest/WorldInfoGlobalTestRequest, TavernApplicationService methods backed by Tavern.world_info/WorldInfoEntry, frontend typed clients, backend/tests/test_v1_world_info_global.py, and spec/task notes. Validation passed: py_compile for changed Python files; isolated clean-worktree compileall, focused WorldInfo global test (2 passed), backend/tests (31 passed), full pytest (260 passed, with existing frontend/dist copied for the legacy static-shell test); frontend typecheck/build/test; git diff --cached --check. Unrelated MySQL WIP and deleted reference PNGs remain unstaged.
